key_themes: 人形机器人商业化与美中竞争
AI基础设施与记忆体涨价
上游半导体材料自主可控
供应短缺驱动的估值重构
aleabitoreddit.recent_shift: 从早期广泛讨论多个主题转向高度聚焦光子学上游和机器人整机，并对媒体负面叙事导致的市场过度反应形成强烈逆势交易认知
representative_quotes: I personally think $SIVE can be the next $LITE. In the past few months alone, we've seen... partnerships with O-Net pushing ELS into mass production... $JBL 1.6T LRO mass production signals... $GFS SCALE reference level laser for hyperscalers...

Retail thinks a 30-60% drop is a 'falling knife' where bagholders will never recover... I see it as long term ownership over the next hyperscaler with $NBIS, 40% of the InP supply chain with $AXTI, leader of the next optical shift with $SIVE...

Photonics is backed by actual revenue numbers and it's an architectural shift championed by $NVDA. Quantum barely has any revenue. $LITE is completely sold out for the next 2 years... $COHR is bottlenecked... All the CW capacity from independent players... are likely to become scarce resources.

key_themes: 结合伽马热区、净权利金失衡、期权流与技术分析构建完整交易框架
AI工具与数据平台（如Unusual Whales）辅助期权交易决策
跟踪政客交易披露（如特朗普）与地缘政治事件影响
unusual_whales.recent_shift: 近期从侧重技术工具与期权流教育转向更多关注地缘政治事件（伊朗局势、特朗普交易）及宏观市场数据（就业、房价、通胀）的分享。
representative_quotes: Political trading posts get shared everywhere. But most of the time, people only see the headline. The @unusual_whales Political Trading Dashboard lets you actually dig into the data behind those disclosures.
This $BRKB trade is one of my favorite @unusual_whales examples because it shows what a complete flow story can actually look like. Not one screenshot. Not one alert. The entire progression.
We just changed the options game. Now, ask Mr Whale to help you navigate the options flow. It can create the filters you want, help determine unusual flow, and so much more.

key_themes: AI产业链持续增长，存储和半导体设备需求旺盛
玻璃基板和光纤技术是下一代AI芯片的关键
可回收火箭和商业航天带来全球物流变革
AI的安全漏洞和隐私保护问题日益突出
xiaomustock.recent_shift: 近期观点从短期投机转向长期持有，强调仓位管理和风险控制，避免杠杆带来的风险。
representative_quotes: 存储起来，说明ai未来光明，其他概念才有机会，才值得抄底
康宁最大的魅力在于未来的确定性。英伟达让康宁扩产10倍，那么在投产后说明康宁业绩也要10倍涨幅！
活下去才有机会，仓位管理比买对啥更重要
